ops.title: E12 sign-off: accept M1/M3 clamp-lift (fable, 2026-07-13)
ops.body: ACCEPT the M1/M3 clamp-lift operationalization. The plan's literal 'corrective oversample 3->6' is a verified no-op: run_e8.oversample_corrective clamps corrective to the direction count (post-dedup direction=1570 vs 3x573=1719), so caps 3 and 6 produce byte-identical data (n_train 5283). M1/M3 lift the clamp: corrective -> 6x deduped = 3438, exceeding direction 1570 — the only reading with a non-zero effect and the lever E11's verdict names (threshold geometry cannot buy prose coverage; the mix is the lever). Reverting to literal cap=6 would spend ~$15 training adapters byte-identical to incumbent 002 and test nothing. Already journaled in the E12 prereg (clamp_discovery + note fields); this note records the accept decision. Gate discipline unchanged: cid (free) first; judge only cells that add prose corrective coverage at matched budget.
